payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Apparently I have a type when it comes to Halloween costumes, but after having enough people send me pictures of new Dante, going, "He looks like you!" I was like, "Fuck it. I'm going to embrace it." So yes, I guess we'll go around and introduce our costumes, because it sounds like fun right now. I'm Dante from Devil May Cry 5. The best I could do in one week's time, most of which was spent in London. What about you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello, everyone, and welcome to tonight's episode of Critical Role, where a bunch of us nerdy-ass voice actors sit around and play Dungeons & Dragons. I know it's November 1st and Halloween was last night, but that's bullshit because we would have missed Halloween, so we're doing it anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Halloween's when you want it to be!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "They were a very informative partner. They are the one that introduced me to the great possibility of power under Uk'otoa. We traveled this ocean for quite a number of years together, but they proved to be a coward. They took something important to our mission and vanished, and I have spent many years trying to recover what they stole. With no luck. I figured it was more worth my time to pillage enough coin to pay other people to find them for me. And so far, based on the fact that it brought you to me, a much more successful endeavor, eh?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do they seem to be the same three on each, or is it just silhouettes?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's just silhouettes of three figures.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck, fuck, fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear Avantika's voice echo from across the way. She goes, "These are the Chosen." She brings light over towards the one of Uk'otoa on the wall and goes, "I guess that makes this one me?" She takes her finger and takes a little blood from the corner of her mouth from the fight and draws a little smiley face on one of the three. "And this one is you," and goes and draws another face on the middle one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can see the resemblance. The question is, if that's you, and that's me, who's our third friend?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That is a very good question."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You said you had met only one other Chosen before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Only one, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And what happened to them?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys all begin to climb up the stairs, the chamber is filling very quickly with the water. It's now reaching the base of the stairs, at which point, as you guys-- Beau, you and Jester, there's just enough water now where your buoyancy carries you off your feet and you're now actually treading water in the chamber. At which point Avantika makes it to the surface with a large gasp of air, and but a few moments later Fjord also breaks the surface.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start heading towards the stairs. I'm going to recommend everybody else, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That sounds good, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes, "Yeah, okay, of course." Jester's like, "This is not very good. Where's Fjord?" She's looking over very nervously towards the pool, which now the chamber's rapidly filling. You're already at knee height.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He likes water. He'll be fine. Come on! Let's get out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I stand with Jester at the edge of the pool, looking down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys, glancing down. Jamedi's back in the chamber, his eyes wide, goes, "We should go. Bring her back, she owes me money!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm grabbing Nott by the scruff and dragging her up the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You don't have to drag me, I'm going!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys all begin to climb up the stairs, the chamber is filling very quickly with the water. It's now reaching the base of the stairs, at which point, as you guys-- Beau, you and Jester, there's just enough water now where your buoyancy carries you off your feet and you're now actually treading water in the chamber. At which point Avantika makes it to the surface with a large gasp of air, and but a few moments later Fjord also breaks the surface.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start heading towards the stairs. I'm going to recommend everybody else, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That sounds good, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes, "Yeah, okay, of course." Jester's like, "This is not very good. Where's Fjord?" She's looking over very nervously towards the pool, which now the chamber's rapidly filling. You're already at knee height.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He likes water. He'll be fine. Come on! Let's get out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I stand with Jester at the edge of the pool, looking down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys, glancing down. Jamedi's back in the chamber, his eyes wide, goes, "We should go. Bring her back, she owes me money!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm grabbing Nott by the scruff and dragging her up the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You don't have to drag me, I'm going!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, there is the fountain, but it has been-- It rose back up to the top when this chamber door was opened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're all going into a full swim here, double move, half speed for all of you guys, so it's going to take you a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm walking up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Except for you. You guys are already up there. As you all get to the stairway and make your way up to the top, the water continues to pour up, following behind you. You get to the stairs, and you're having to trudge through. You get up to the next, the secondary floor, and there you stand, with the walls that are partially relieved and covered, and there is the stone slab that is lifted up, and there's orchard before you. What do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the orchard, that's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Were there-- There were stairs up the sides, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Weren't there spiral stairways?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yasha goes over and gives you a boost. That gives you advantage on your acrobatics check to try and parkour up the stairs and leap off the sides.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, let's go. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to climb up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The stairway itself, if you recall, ends a little bit ways up, and there's a bit of a drop down to get to it. It slowly comes down and does meet the floor. There's a bit of a lip to get up there now, so if you ascend to the top of the staircase, there is about a ten foot or so jump where it is smooth walls before you can actually get to the top floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll get up there and drop a rope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's try that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Like to make the jump? Do you want to jump off of Yasha or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can Yasha fly?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Give me a boost, the cheerleader hoist?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 11 points of damage, good. So, I now need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You're now underwater. You take your last breath, and you've all completely been submerged in this chamber. The other yuan-ti you can see in the darkness below here, the only bit of light that you have are the globes still from you. Although, are those concentration?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've got a light on my stick anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, they're gone then because Enlarge, Reduce.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would have cast Light on my stick, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're casting Light on your stick.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Anybody I don't like within 15 feet is currently getting ransacked by tiny fairies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I love it. What's the save on that? Wisdom, I believe.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wisdom 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the malison succeeds, the two broodguard fail. Roll damage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's-- Freaking out a little bit. 3d8 radiant damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 11 (counting) 12 points of radiant damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 point of radiant damage, nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: None of that was like a melee attack or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Because your damage is reduced since you're teeny.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't-- They're fairies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm heading straight towards the exit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What was the roll you had to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16. That will hit the malison. You do not get sneak attack, however.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's fine. It causes nine hit points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice. That finishes your go there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would probably bonus action-- if I had a bonus action I would shoot again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd allow it. Because we'll say you're like-- You were standing on the water so as you're leaning over the surface you're like squeezing it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16 to hit again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Another 11 points of damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, now you don't anymore. The water surface begins to crush underneath you and then you have to delve underneath as it meets it. It's filled up and it's now making its way up the stairs, towards the top of the temple. So, 25 to 20, anyone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 point of radiant damage, nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: None of that was like a melee attack or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Because your damage is reduced since you're teeny.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't-- They're fairies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm heading straight towards the exit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What was the roll you had to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16. That will hit the malison. You do not get sneak attack, however.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's fine. It causes nine hit points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice. That finishes your go there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would probably bonus action-- if I had a bonus action I would shoot again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd allow it. Because we'll say you're like-- You were standing on the water so as you're leaning over the surface you're like squeezing it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16 to hit again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Another 11 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11 points of damage, good. So, I now need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If I'm on top of the water, how much space do I have?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So that finishes Beau's turn. It is now their turn. They both rolled really high initiative, and you guys rolled really terribly. The malisons closest are going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There were holes above, but they were in the ceiling, and they were part of the stonework. Up top, there was an actual trapdoor that you had locked behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but not like metal with holes for the water to go through?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That you know of. There are holes above, which is where the sacrificial blood would drip through into the fountain. So, what are you doing, guys? Are you running first?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Uh huh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're swimming?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm swimming up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (counting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to spend a ki point to do Step of the Wind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Beau is also--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm also--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You've made it up the top.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is she hitting the trapdoor?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, she's not out of the temple. She's heading up the stairs. She's out of the battle for the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Got it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That is your go, Nott. It is now Caduceus, Caleb, and Jester. You guys can decide amongst yourselves the order.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: AC is 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've never done this before. Let's see here. I'm at 5th level, so it's 2d8. What's a d8?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's like a little-- there you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, eight points of damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight points of damage to it. As you reach out and grab it-- (electric shock) You watch as its tongue retracts into its head and its eyes go wide. (pained noise) It loses some air, and it eventually shakes and pushes off your hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a verbal spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Verbal. You have to speak.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does that work?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can do it, but you lose a bunch of air to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, boy! I hate water. I'm going to swim away, as fast as I can. I still have to disengage, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will bonus action disengage and swim around past Fjord. Yeah, around this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is as far as you can get.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Going towards the exits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Swimming over--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With one hand.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: She is currently-- Both of you, since you cast spells, mark five points of lost air.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then she will Toll the Dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She will cast Toll the Dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a saving throw for him. What's the save?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 15 wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is a 13. That does not do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 2d8.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 2d12, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah. 2d12.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's already taken damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Where are my 12s?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, question  Matt, did you move me two groups of movement? Because it would be for the bonus action, action, and movement. So it'd be one more third.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Casting the spell's a bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When you cast it, you get that extra juice, and then bonus action on every following round?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, so yeah, you'd be up there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Thank you for the heads up on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ten points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten points? Oof. Yeah, he's not looking good either. They're both looking pretty rough.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's going to try to get the most advantageous point towards the door as well.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Each hit's a minute off the-- I'll have to look at how I worked it out here. Essentially, at this point now, Jester and Nott are going to have to start making constitution saving throws each round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Casting the spell's a bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When you cast it, you get that extra juice, and then bonus action on every following round?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, so yeah, you'd be up there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Thank you for the heads up on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ten points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten points? Oof. Yeah, he's not looking good either. They're both looking pretty rough.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's going to try to get the most advantageous point towards the door as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She is currently-- Both of you, since you cast spells, mark five points of lost air.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Five points of lost air.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to remember that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You have five? Total?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For the purposes of this challenge, to keep it interesting, five points before you're now starting to make-- is now considered how long you can hold your breath going forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh fuck!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you do, you pierce past all the humanoid muscles across the neck and its shoulders. Immediately, the water before you fills with crimson. You can see it thrash for a minute, its serpent arms trying to reach behind to strike at you. You swim away as they go limp, and it begins to float up. So that's that. You still have a little movement left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, my turn. Do I need to first make a constitution save?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At the end of your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: At the end of my turn, okay. I'll swim up and poke the thing with my shortsword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You swim up a bit there. Go for it. Disadvantage on the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy. Okay. What does this thing do? 15!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15 hits, and engaged with allies. You do get sneak attack damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh? I do?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. It's engaged with Caduceus and Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wow. Okay. That's 21 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How do you want to do this?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Because it can't see me, I'll go up and-- I don't use shortsword a lot, so I'll let it float for a second and grab it from behind and then rake it across the back of its neck.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, slowly making your way through, until eventually the surface of the water, the rushing sound gets louder and louder as you all strike it! As you do, it carries you down in this rapid Goonies-style waterslide, you're all coasting down the side of the stones, and elements of the stone just barely scraping and clipping the back of your butt and your back and you're like "Oh god!", it's not enough to damage you but you're going to be bruised as shit in the morning, but you're coasting down, you can see as the city is coming towards you, the water is now pouring through and snaking through the city-- no pun intended-- there are groups of yuan-ti that have clamored up onto the buildings and are currently trying to pull themselves out of the water and help others get up out of the middle of this strange flood that has taken over the center of their civilization.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Drei.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't matter, you're out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two successes, failure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No I'm not, I'm unconscious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm stable! That's right, I'm unconscious! Never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Success. Three successes, one failure. Jester--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 18 plus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Success on Jester. For Yasha?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Success, all right! So only one fail. As a group, that is a group success. So you all manage to just-- Yep, and both Jamedi and Avantika are fine. So, you all manage to just barely push your way in a certain direction, you all begin to drift down--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Like a skydiving team?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Sorry. As you guys are rushing towards the treeline, you hear the shouting in the distance. You glance over, now that the water level has stopped you can look behind, and you can see probably two dozen or so yuan-ti have now begun to give chase. They're about a hundred feet behind you, but they saw you exit and they're on their way giving chase. Now we're turning this into a skill challenge chase as you guys are making your way through. As you guys are now charging into the jungle, you're not doing stealth, so your speed isn't as slow, which took you a day and a half or so to traverse this jungle to the center, unless you want to keep stealthy, if it's charging through--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Might as well go with the flow.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is the water going the way we want to go?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Mostly, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I would be calling out this whole time which ways we want to go to get out, ja.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you just continue with the flow of it, the flow eventually comes to a stop on the outside of the city, maybe about 15 or 20 feet from the treeline where you first entered.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keep moving.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus in the front, everyone behind him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast-- really quickly since I have nothing else left, I'm going to cast Disguise Self and look like one of the lizard people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha will be actually up front, just in front of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We need Caleb up front too, to guide us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As a note, all the makeup has been washed off.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Full speed, great. We have six rounds of this challenge.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. As you guys are rushing towards the treeline, you hear the shouting in the distance. You glance over, now that the water level has stopped you can look behind, and you can see probably two dozen or so yuan-ti have now begun to give chase. They're about a hundred feet behind you, but they saw you exit and they're on their way giving chase. Now we're turning this into a skill challenge chase as you guys are making your way through. As you guys are now charging into the jungle, you're not doing stealth, so your speed isn't as slow, which took you a day and a half or so to traverse this jungle to the center, unless you want to keep stealthy, if it's charging through--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Run.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Loudest thing you ever heard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Raiders of the Lost Ark, we're just cutting through the jungle.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, I'll allow that for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I was going to say Yasha can take out the Magician's Judge and start cleaving machete-style through the brush, making it far easier for us to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Yasha going to push at the front, which, with a higher speed than you, she can definitely do, and begin to carve through swarths of the jungle to make it an easier passage. For her, make an athletics check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Advantage or straight up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Straight up, unless she's raging.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, she's rage-clearing!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys have been running for the better part of two hours now; it's a ways through this jungle to get back to the shore. So first and foremost, I need everyone here to go ahead and make a constitution saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I just turn Beau around like, (shouting) That was amazing! How did you do that with a throwing star?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) I think these are magic throwing stars! I think I bought magic throwing stars!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll consider that a success. You guys keep rushing. You assume, wherever the yuan-ti were, they're a little unsettled by this large explosion in the direction of where they're travelling, and it slows them down a bit as they try and coast around the area where the damage is. However, there seems to be a lizardmen hunting party now, that is in the jungle a little ways ahead of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What? Oh jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This thing won't stop!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You guys continue onward, since you're just running through this jungle best you can, full sprint, it manages to keep ahead but there is a threat of exhaustion as you continue to move. So, you now begin to hear the sound, this familiar clacking (guttural noises) sound of the lizardmen that you saw in the jungle before. Who's doing what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What? Oh jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This thing won't stop!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys have been running for the better part of two hours now; it's a ways through this jungle to get back to the shore. So first and foremost, I need everyone here to go ahead and make a constitution saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: My favorite saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 23 for Fjord, 20 for Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take a point of exhaustion there, Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just barely succeeded.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jester rolled an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One point of exhaustion.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, conditions.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jamedi?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Avantika takes a point of exhaustion.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: --across the checks here. Yasha throws Caleb fireman-carry over the shoulder and you guys begin running and running and running. For this next additional hour now, as you guys are charging through, following the path, we'll say you've gone three or four hours of straight sprint through the forest. Sprint, stop, run. You're breathing heavy, you're sweating profusely, your body is aching, your mouth is just filled with the worst cottonmouth, you're dehydrated. You can hear the yelping of approaching lizardmen and yuan-ti as you see the light begin to slowly break ahead of you, through the trees as the treeline begins to thin, and the faintest bit of blue is visible. Within a few more moments, you break through the treeline and you've found yourself back to the white sand beaches of Urukaxl. There, as you come out to the sand, the hot reflection of the sun against the light. You can see now the sun is close to setting at this point, the sky itself has gotten slowly darker as you've moved past. The white beaches have now come to a faint dull yellow and orange with the coming sunset light. Nott emerges from the nearby brush.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I remember that well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have the ability to carry a large amount because of my size, can I piggyback and not get too much of a roll if I throw Caleb on my back?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I will make this one of your checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have disadvantage because--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or you could have Yasha do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll have Ya-- yeah, no, that's a better idea, because I was-- five hit points, maybe not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you share the idea with Yasha, Yasha's going to attempt to--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Athletics?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Does Yasha have a point of exhaustion?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She does.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So disadvantage on her athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I want to--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's her biggest modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One second please, because this is going to attribute to her--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, a natural 20 and a 12, so that's 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19! That's a success.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (sigh of relief)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That puts us at six total successes--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're all clear?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point Vera says, "Captain, at this moment, it appears that we have maybe 11 days of supplies, given that our crew has now swelled. As such, we could probably make it back to Darktow to also complete the repairs on The Mist, as it is seaworthy, but I do not know how long. So that would be my recommendation. Maybe making a stop or two along the way, whatever's close by." The "captain considers. "Very well, I guess we'll make our way westward onto Darktow to get repairs done, "to supply up, and should you wish to stay, make our way to the next leg of our journey. Who knows? It seems that you are up for your own rewards to be reaped, eh?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And I do believe," You see Jamedi sitting on the ground, and goes, "Yes?" "You have earned what our contract assured you. Please, Vera, if you could retrieve the payment." Vera leaves and in a moment, comes back with a small chest and hands it over to Jamedi, who sets it into his pouch and satchel. He stands up for a second, nods his head, "I hope you understand, that with all due respect, this is our last time working together." The Captain says, "Aye, I understand, but it is your loss. There is always more work for you. Where would you like to be dropped off?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: In a graveyard.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Understood. Get Jeremiah to get food cooking immediately. I think a fine meal and a full night's rest is in order. Friends, I'm impressed, and I'm thankful that you've not only upheld your side of the bargain, you proved yourselves as quite formidable mercenaries. I mean no disrespect to some of my crew, but when we get back to Darktow--" She looks at some of the crew. "Turn around." Some of them-- "Maybe we'll deal with some trade off, eh? Send some of them over to The Mist and maybe you'll stay with me for a while."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Indeed. Such a mighty display on the way back, I feel like I would be left wanting if I didn't try and pursue the same sort of glory.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. Well, these gifts are paltry. Once Uk'otoa is truly free, then the true blessing can be given."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Captain, may I ask, you knew of this location already. Do you have a lead on another?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have a lead on someone that should be in Darktow that would be able to-- with the right amount of coin-- give us the information we seek. Hopefully. If not, we'll be sitting here with our thumbs up our asses, but I've paid well enough, and this person has come through before, so fingers crossed, eh?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Indeed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Regardless, I think we could all use a bit of rest, eh?" Looks over to Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would be amenable at this point.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, it opens up. It's the normal office den set up, but there's the balcony out back that opens up, and there on the balcony, Avantika is standing on the balcony and there's this column of water that is rising up out of the ocean. She's nude. It's washing her. She's in the process, in the throes of manipulating this water. She's learning whatever this new gifted power that she has. Her hair is twirling up into the stream and it's this beautiful almost-dance between her and this elemental force that she now has. She looks back over her shoulder at you, knowing that you've been there for at least a couple minutes. "I'll be just a moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's really not. I mean, look how good you're doing, right? Thriving. Surviving.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This was the worst day of my life.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can't leave yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Your whole life?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, as far as I can remember. This was a really bad day, and water had a lot to do with it. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay. I'll get back to you on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll make my way towards the captain's quarters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going to figure out a way for you to breath underwater. It's going to be okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't care about being underwater. I just don't like looking at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you guys all go to rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm exhausted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys go to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A long rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You head your way to the captain's quarters?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You head to the door. It's closed. (knocking) For a moment, you hear this sound of rushing water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She's cleaning up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll try the door.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "A fine sailor and a foolish coward he ended up to be, but he was the one that... opened my eyes to the destiny of Uk'otoa. We traveled together for a number of years before he just abandoned and absconded with something important. I've been trying to find out where he went, but he is very slippery. Wherever he is, either what you have in your sword is what he took away or wherever he is he has the third with him."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not aerated.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I am excited for you to experience this."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I am as well. Is it everything you thought it would be?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I've only but scratched the surface, and I've never felt a connection like this with the sea that has been my life. It's incredible. I can only do it in bursts, but I can cause it to swell and move and part and flood and shift. It's-- (sighs). Soon." She reaches out and touches the top of your hand. "Soon. I promise. Now, we were talking before and I think it's only fair." She takes another big sip. "Your blade is very interesting. I knew one other who had a blade very similar. Referred to it as the Sword of Fathoms."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sword of Fathoms?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The previous chosen."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can you tell me more about this person who wielded it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "His name was Vandren."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Fuck!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Thankfully this collector enjoyed nights long at sea and that happens to be our specialty. His corpse now adorns one of the many beautiful islands and now I have this beautiful reminder." The hand, you can see, it's now mostly healed over, but there is a scar where this orb once resided in her palm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This Vandren, you say he told you about the Sword of Fathoms or he had a Sword of Fathoms?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He carried the same blade."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The same one. Was there an area, a destination, a direction that you last knew that he was going? Is it in our interest to try and find him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It is very much in our interests. We were going to go and visit this very island some time ago when he was the only one to have one of these orbs."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How did you find, if you don't mind me asking, yours?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well-- I had to kill a number of men. It was being auctioned off in Port Damali, and there was a collector. Word had gotten to us that this artifact was sold off to this individual. Well, needless to say, he put up a bit of a struggle."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure he did.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I have been patient this long. I can be patient a bit further. Very well." She leans forward with the wine glass, very close, and goes, "It's been a very long day. I think rest is in order?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just splash acid all over it! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You've got this! (background music, rustling)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Now, between you and I--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There was a storm-- do I remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do recall, actually. It was somewhere coming back along this trade route and somewhere in this space the storm had blown through. This is where it sank and you washed up--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Darktow's over here, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Darktow's over here. You washed up on this island, here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are over there at Urukaxl. You washed up over here, so the storm was in this vicinity.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, okay, okay. Yep. Fuck it. Yes, I do remember where the ship sank.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then, my friend, I think we are going to do even more amazing things together."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I agree. I believe that will have to wait until we find ourselves on Darktow, though.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you all rest, a long rest at sea, as the Squalleater and The Mistake make their way towards Darktow to the far west, we'll end tonight's game there and pick up there next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm not going to stay. You don't walk out of the captain's quarters at sun-up. Plus, I'm super tired. I will leave and try to stealth back to the quarters of everyone else.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a passive perception of 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hopefully you're super asleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, copper dice gods. 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You carefully and quietly tiptoe your way through the hallway to your assigned quarters, of which you are sharing with whom?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One eye slowly opens as you are keen to be somewhat aware-- living alone, out in the dangerous wood-- to any sort of aberrant noise in the vicinity. You hear the faint creak of very gentle footsteps as Fjord makes his way into your chambers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I figure out what happened just by looking at him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You? Yeah. (giggling)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sleep well with your bad decisions.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Over the next couple of days you will because this is a multi-day travel to get to Darktow, so your points of exhaustion will be gone by the time it matters.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One eye slowly opens as you are keen to be somewhat aware-- living alone, out in the dangerous wood-- to any sort of aberrant noise in the vicinity. You hear the faint creak of very gentle footsteps as Fjord makes his way into your chambers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I figure out what happened just by looking at him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You? Yeah. (giggling)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sleep well with your bad decisions.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you all rest, a long rest at sea, as the Squalleater and The Mistake make their way towards Darktow to the far west, we'll end tonight's game there and pick up there next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, no, what?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also, everyone levels up. Everyone's level seven now. (exclamations)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cheers!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Aw, that's a great ending. That's a good finish.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To that degree, while I have you guys here, let's roll some hit points for those who are present.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we recover our exhaustion?
